_comment: Canonical solver-binary manifest. Consumed by dexbtx_miner.solver_updater (binary) and dexbtx_miner.wrapper_updater (the top-level `version` field) on every miner startup. To add a new platform: add an entry under `platforms`. To force-upgrade across a fork boundary: set `min_required_sha256` on the relevant platform entry — a host whose binary != min that cannot download the new one will REFUSE to mine. v1 single-binary schema (top-level sha256+url) is still recognized by the updater as legacy (treated as x86_64-linux); the v2 platforms-dict schema below is preferred.
notes: v0.4.15 — rebuilds all NVIDIA + Spark solvers from BTX v0.32.11 (tag 215170f, commit 601b2cc), the official fix for the v0.32.10 MatMul-V3 GPU pre-hash scan regression (the scan shipped half-wired at the fork, so GPU miners fell back to slow CPU per-nonce: util ~1-7%, hashrate cratered; shares stayed consensus-VALID — a throughput regression, not correctness). v0.32.11 restores the GPU scan under V3 (V3 seed builder added to the CUDA + Metal scan kernels, IsMatMulParentMtpSeedActive gates removed, SetDeterministicMatMulSeeds fails closed, + a CUDA CI parity lane that asserts the scan flags match CheckMatMulPreHashGate). Validated on home-1070 (GTX 1070 / sm_61): 99% util with the scan engaging, 54 shares / 0 rejects over 10 min. min_required_sha256 bumped to the v0.32.11 binaries so every host on the slow v0.32.10 build force-upgrades on next restart. x86_64 fat binary carries native cubins sm_61;sm_75;sm_80;sm_86;sm_89;sm_90;sm_120 (GTX 10-series through RTX 50-series) + LTO, built on home-1070. arm64-darwin stays on v0.32.10 (Metal rebuild deferred; outside this release's NVIDIA+Spark scope).

x86_64-linux.force_upgrade_reason: BTX v0.32.11 fixes the v0.32.10 MatMul-V3 GPU pre-hash scan regression. This build ALSO statically links the CUDA runtime (no libcudart.so.12 dependency) so it runs on CUDA-12 AND CUDA-13 hosts — earlier dynamic builds failed to load on CUDA-13-only rigs (driver 580+, RTX 50-series), aborting install. Pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork at mainnet block 130,500.
x86_64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.11 / matmul-v3. STATIC cudart (driver-only; runs on CUDA 12 and 13). CUDA 12.8 toolkit, native cubins sm_61;sm_75;sm_80;sm_86;sm_89;sm_90;sm_120 (GTX 10-series through RTX 50-series). LTO. Built on home-1070; KAT-verified byte-identical (CPU+CUDA digest) to the prior dynamic 3f7bd3f7 build, which is itself bit-equivalent to btxd consensus.

aarch64-linux.force_upgrade_reason: BTX v0.32.11 fixes the v0.32.10 MatMul-V3 GPU pre-hash scan regression (GPU fell to slow CPU per-nonce). Hosts on the v0.32.10 binary force-upgrade. Pre-v0.32.10 solvers also produce 100% invalid shares after the fork at mainnet block 130,500.
aarch64-linux.notes: BTX v0.32.11 / matmul-v3. CUDA 12.8, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (Ampere through Blackwell consumer). Default ARM entry. CUDA-13-only hosts (GB10/Spark, sm_121) should set DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda13. Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml.

aarch64-linux-cuda12.force_upgrade_reason: BTX v0.32.11 fixes the v0.32.10 MatMul-V3 GPU pre-hash scan regression (GPU fell to slow CPU per-nonce). Hosts on the v0.32.10 binary force-upgrade. Pre-v0.32.10 solvers also produce 100% invalid shares after the fork at mainnet block 130,500.
aarch64-linux-cuda12.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda12. BTX v0.32.11 / matmul-v3. CUDA 12.8 build, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120 (no sm_121 — use cuda13 build for GB10/Spark). Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml.

aarch64-linux-cuda13.force_upgrade_reason: BTX v0.32.11 fixes the v0.32.10 MatMul-V3 GPU pre-hash scan regression (GPU fell to slow CPU per-nonce). Hosts on the v0.32.10 binary force-upgrade. Pre-v0.32.10 solvers also produce 100% invalid shares after the fork at mainnet block 130,500.
aarch64-linux-cuda13.notes: Opt-in via DEXBTX_PLATFORM_KEY=aarch64-linux-cuda13. BTX v0.32.11 / matmul-v3. CUDA 13.0, archs sm_80;sm_90;sm_120;sm_121. Covers GB10/Spark + RTX Blackwell consumer needing a CUDA-13 runtime. Built via build-solver-aarch64.yml.

arm64-darwin.force_upgrade_reason: MatMul-V3 fork at mainnet block 130,500 — pre-v0.32.10 solvers produce 100% invalid shares after the fork.
arm64-darwin.notes: Apple Silicon Metal backend, rebuilt from BTX v0.32.10 source. CI verifies cpu_digest == metal_digest == reference_digest before publish.
